results.description: The Salix City Council is looking at putting a moratorium on data centers in place for a year while they study policy and ordinances. The move comes as a data center is being looked at to the northeast of the...

results.title: Senate approves in first discussion the draft reform to the Organic Law of the National Police
results.description: Santo Domingo.– The Senate of the Republic approved this Wednesday, in the first reading, the bill that modifies the Organic Law of the National Police, an initiative that seeks to transform and modernize the institution through the creation of a special police career regime. The legislative piece was considered during a session that lasted for [...] La entrada Senate approves in first discussion the draft reform to the Organic Law of the National Police se publicó primero en De Último Minuto English .

results.title: Iran-US war latest: Missile sirens sound across the Middle East after Trump resumes strikes on Tehran
results.description: Trump says ceasefire is ‘over’ following strikes on ships in the Strait of Hormuz

results.title: US, Iran trade new strikes in fight over Hormuz strait
results.description: The US and Iran have intensified their conflict, trading strikes over the strategic Strait of Hormuz, a crucial oil shipping corridor. As tensions escalate, Tehran insists on control of the strait, challenging the US's efforts to ensure free passage.
